parameters.query:
SELECT
  c."IdCita",
  c."IdUsu",
  c."IdOrden",
  c."Fecha",
  c."Hora",
  c."Texto" AS motivo,
  p."Nombre",
  p."Apellidos",
  COALESCE(NULLIF(c."Movil",''), p."TelMovil") AS telefono,
  p."AceptaWhatsApp"
FROM "DCitas" c
LEFT JOIN "Pacientes" p ON p."IdPac" = c."IdPac"
WHERE c."Fecha" = {{ $json.fechaManannaInt }}
  AND c."IdSitC" NOT IN (3,4)
  AND c."Recordada" = 0
  AND c."IdPac" IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(NULLIF(c."Movil",''), p."TelMovil") IS NOT NULL
  AND (p."AceptaWhatsApp" = true OR p."AceptaWhatsApp" IS NULL)
ORDER BY c."Hora"
